prompts: The video depicts golden hour sunlight, soft lighting, medium wide-angle, low-angle perspective, warm color palette. A whimsical village is nestled at the base of a giant, hollow tree trunk, surrounded by lush greenery and mushrooms. Little felt gnomes in woolen hats drive a miniature wooden train on moss-covered tracks. The train, pulled by a tiny engine, transports acorns and berries in small carts. Sunlight filters through the leaves above, casting soft shadows and highlighting the rich textures of the bark and foliage.
